programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Cats Does Countdown does Christmas. Jon Richardson and Daisy May Cooper play Rob Beckett and Judi Love. Katie Norris is in Dictionary Corner. Joe Wilkinson brings the eggnog.
Jon Richardson and Daisy May Cooper take on Rob Beckett and Judi Love. With Joe Wilkinson.

programme.title: Kinky Boots
programme.desc: British comedy drama. A drag queen comes to the rescue of a man who, after inheriting his father's shoe factory, needs to diversify his product if he wants to keep the business afloat.
A drag queen comes to the rescue of a shoe factory which needs to diversify to survive.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make the finest Panama hats? Who rounds up Florida's escaped pythons? How do they keep drivers safe in the world's longest tunnel? S9/Ep3

programme.title: Free Guy
programme.desc: Comedy action starring Ryan Reynolds. Guy lives in Free City. Free City isn't real. Nor is Guy. It's all a big online game. Can he take down the corrupt game publisher?

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic drama set in 60s LA, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Brad Pitt and Margot Robbie. A failing actor's world collides with the Manson Family.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Andrew was adopted as a baby, but his birth mother refused to sign the adoption papers. Plus, Julie discovered her brother was given up for adoption. S12/Ep4

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Series following ambulance crews working across the West Midlands. In this episode, paramedic Chelsie and technician Simon rush to save a baby who was born not breathing. (S1 Ep1/10)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The two daughters of an elderly writer suffering from dementia accuse his current wife of secretly giving him erectile dysfunction pills to produce a new heir.
Two daughters of a writer accuse his current wife of abuse.

programme.title: A Killer Makes a Call
programme.desc: David Browning, a married father of two, confesses that he has killed his boss, Jill. But he claims that he is not guilty of murder, on the grounds of diminished responsibility. But how will the jury decide?
A married father of two claims he has killed his boss. But is the evidence a red herring?

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: PC Martain Anderson and fellow motorway cops pursue a BMW driving on cloned plates. What do the driver and passengers have to hide? And in Newcastle, PC Jamie Leslie follows a car doing 50mph in a 30 zone.
PC Martain Anderson and fellow motorway cops pursue a vehicle driving on cloned plates.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: Classic Oscar-winning action-adventure film sequel starring Harrison Ford and Sean Connery, 1989. Indiana Jones goes up against the Nazis again while in pursuit of the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Victoria Diggers might have found a multi-million-dollar load, but they need help extracting it. The Scrappers continue to struggle with broken machines. S4/Ep9

programme.title: Murder On CCTV
programme.desc: Family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight. With no apparent motive or witnesses, can investigators track down his killer on CCTV? S4/Ep11

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Guy is going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck is serving pork fusion. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint dishes out BBQ pork and pork belly ramen. S23/Ep11

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House...
programme.desc: ...Is Haunted. Actor Shaun Williamson is tormented by a spirit that has pushed him downstairs. The team attempt to restore safety and peace to his home. S4/Ep2

programme.title: Billy Connolly: In His Own Words
programme.desc: The life and career of a nationally renowned comedian is explored from a lonely childhood to finally arriving at the forefront to the entertainment industry.
We look back at the career of one of Britain's most famous comedians - Billy Connolly.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Scorsese's epic drama with Leonardo DiCaprio, Daniel Day-Lewis and Cameron Diaz. As gang warfare dominates 1860s New York, an orphan seeks revenge against his father's killer.

programme.title: New: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Animal Oddities: Experience stunning animal spectacles: soaring over northern nomads, Pacific giants, a US pig stampede and fierce ocean predators.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: Classic Oscar-winning action-adventure film sequel starring Harrison Ford and Sean Connery, 1989. Indiana Jones goes up against the Nazis again while in pursuit of the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Press Preview
programme.desc: Lively debate and discussion with our panel of paper reviewers about the stories making tomorrow morning's newspapers.
